abilities.name: Read Posts
abilities.description: List published blog posts (title, URL, date, excerpt, categories, tags).

abilities.name: Create Post
abilities.description: Create a new blog post (title, content, status, categories, tags, slug).

abilities.name: Update Post
abilities.description: Update an existing post by ID.

abilities.name: Delete Post
abilities.description: Move a post to trash by ID.

abilities.name: Read Pages
abilities.description: List published pages (title, URL, parent, status).

abilities.name: Create Page
abilities.description: Create a new WordPress page (title, content, status, parent, slug).

abilities.name: Update Page
abilities.description: Update an existing page by ID.

abilities.name: Delete Page
abilities.description: Move a page to trash by ID.

abilities.name: Read Categories
abilities.description: List all post categories with IDs, slugs, and post counts.

abilities.name: Create Category
abilities.description: Create a new post category.

abilities.name: Read Tags
abilities.description: List all post tags with IDs, slugs, and post counts.

abilities.name: Create Tag
abilities.description: Create a new post tag.

abilities.name: Read Comments
abilities.description: List comments with author, status, and content snippet.

abilities.name: Approve Comment
abilities.description: Approve a pending comment by ID.

abilities.name: Delete Comment
abilities.description: Move a comment to trash by ID.

abilities.name: List Media
abilities.description: Browse and search the media library by type, keyword, or date.

abilities.name: Get Media
abilities.description: Retrieve the full metadata of a specific media file by ID.

abilities.name: Count Media
abilities.description: Get media library counts grouped by MIME type, plus a total.

abilities.name: Update Media
abilities.description: Update the title, alt text, caption, or description of a media file by ID.

abilities.name: Delete Media
abilities.description: Permanently delete a media file from the media library by ID.

abilities.name: Upload Media
abilities.description: Upload an image or file from a URL directly into the media library.

abilities.name: Upload Media From URL
abilities.description: Pull an image from any web link straight into your media library.

abilities.name: Set Featured Image
abilities.description: Set an image as the featured image (thumbnail) for a post or page.

abilities.name: Read Users
abilities.description: List users with display name, email, and role.

abilities.name: Search Content
abilities.description: Search posts and pages by keyword.

abilities.name: Read Site Info
abilities.description: Return site name, URL, tagline, WP version, and language.

abilities.name: Read Plugins
abilities.description: List all active plugins with name, version, and author.

abilities.name: Get Yoast SEO Meta
abilities.description: Get Yoast SEO title, meta description, and focus keyphrase for a post or page.

abilities.name: Update Yoast SEO Meta
abilities.description: Update Yoast SEO title, meta description, and/or focus keyphrase for a post or page.

abilities.name: Get Rank Math SEO Meta
abilities.description: Get Rank Math SEO title, meta description, focus keyword, and SEO score for a post or page.

abilities.name: Update Rank Math SEO Meta
abilities.description: Update Rank Math SEO title, meta description, and/or focus keyword for a post or page.

abilities.name: List WooCommerce Products
abilities.description: List store products with filtering and pagination.

abilities.name: Get Single Product
abilities.description: Get single product details by ID.

abilities.name: Create WooCommerce Product
abilities.description: Create a new simple or variable product in the store with auto-attributes.

abilities.name: Create Product Variation
abilities.description: Create a new product variation / variant.

abilities.name: Update WooCommerce Product
abilities.description: Update an existing product details (prices, stock, description).

abilities.name: List WooCommerce Orders
abilities.description: List recent orders with status filtering.

abilities.name: Update WooCommerce Order
abilities.description: Update the status of an order.

abilities.name: Refund WooCommerce Order
abilities.description: Create a full or partial refund for an order.

abilities.name: Create WooCommerce Coupon
abilities.description: Create a new coupon code (percentage or fixed discount).

abilities.name: List WooCommerce Coupons
abilities.description: List all active store coupons with usage stats.

abilities.name: Create Order Note
abilities.description: Add a note to an existing order (internal or customer-facing).

abilities.name: List Customers
abilities.description: List registered customers with billing details.

abilities.name: Get Sales Report
abilities.description: Get sales, orders, net revenue, and average order value reports.

abilities.name: Get Low Stock Alerts
abilities.description: Inspect and list products running low on stock.

abilities.name: Moderate Product Reviews
abilities.description: Approve, spam, trash, or reply to product reviews.

abilities.name: List Elementor Pages
abilities.description: List pages/posts built with Elementor (title, ID, URL, status).

abilities.name: Get Page Structure
abilities.description: Get the element tree of an Elementor page by post ID.

abilities.name: Get Element Settings
abilities.description: Get all settings for a specific element by post ID and element ID.

abilities.name: Find Element
abilities.description: Find elements on a page by widget type or settings content search.

abilities.name: List Templates
abilities.description: List Elementor saved templates from the library.

abilities.name: Update Element
abilities.description: Update settings for a widget or container by element ID.

abilities.name: Add Widget
abilities.description: Add a widget to a container or column on an Elementor page.

abilities.name: Add Container
abilities.description: Add a layout container or section to an Elementor page.

abilities.name: Remove Element
abilities.description: Remove a widget or container from an Elementor page by element ID.

abilities.name: Get Active Kit
abilities.description: Retrieve global fonts, color palette, and layout from the active Elementor kit.

abilities.name: Update Active Kit
abilities.description: Update colors and layout settings in the active Elementor kit.

abilities.name: Regenerate CSS
abilities.description: Clear and regenerate all Elementor CSS cache files.

abilities.name: Get Widget Schema
abilities.description: Get control schema for a widget type — margins, padding, background, typography, etc.

abilities.name: Duplicate Element
abilities.description: Clone a widget or container with new unique IDs recursively.

abilities.name: Move Element
abilities.description: Reposition an element to a different parent or index position.

abilities.name: Convert CSS to Elementor
abilities.description: Parse CSS rules into Elementor-compatible settings structure.

abilities.name: Get Page Settings
abilities.description: Read global page config like template, background, and custom CSS.

abilities.name: Update Page Settings
abilities.description: Update page template (canvas/full-width) and page-level settings.

abilities.name: Copy Element Styles
abilities.description: Copy style settings from a source element to a destination element.

abilities.name: Get Breakpoints
abilities.description: Read responsive breakpoint values from Elementor configuration.

abilities.name: List Field Groups
abilities.description: List all registered field groups.

abilities.name: Get Field Group
abilities.description: Get detailed setup of a specific field group.

abilities.name: Create Field Group
abilities.description: Create a brand new custom field group configuration.

abilities.name: Update Field Group Settings
abilities.description: Update existing custom field group rules/configurations.

abilities.name: Delete Field Group
abilities.description: Delete/trash a field group by its key.

abilities.name: Import Field Groups
abilities.description: Programmatically import field groups via raw JSON parameters.

abilities.name: List Fields inside Group
abilities.description: List all registered fields configs inside a specific field group.

abilities.name: Get Field Config Details
abilities.description: Fetch direct key attributes and parameters for a custom field.

abilities.name: Create Field Configuration
abilities.description: Register a new field inside an existing custom group.

abilities.name: Update Field Configuration
abilities.description: Update schema configuration for a custom field.

abilities.name: Delete Field Config
abilities.description: Deletes config parameters for a custom field.

abilities.name: Duplicate Field Config
abilities.description: Duplicate an existing field configuration key.

abilities.name: Force Sync Fields JSON
abilities.description: Force reload and sync schema settings dynamically.

abilities.name: Get Field Value Deep
abilities.description: Dot-notation deep access to variables (e.g. repeater.0.subfield).

abilities.name: Update Field Value Deep
abilities.description: Update specific deep metadata locations with dot-notation.

abilities.name: Delete Field Value
abilities.description: Delete specific key field metadata value.

abilities.name: Get All Fields Values
abilities.description: Get all raw field values mapped on any object.

abilities.name: Bulk Update Values
abilities.description: Bulk update array values instantly.

abilities.name: Get Value & Config Object
abilities.description: Return both config object and mapped values.

abilities.name: List Registered Post Types
abilities.description: List post types with active register mappings.

abilities.name: Create Custom Post Type
abilities.description: Programmatically register brand new WordPress Post Type.

abilities.name: List Registered Taxonomies
abilities.description: List taxonomies structure.

abilities.name: Create Custom Taxonomy
abilities.description: Programmatically register brand new WordPress taxonomy.

abilities.name: List ACF Options Pages
abilities.description: List registered global options views.

abilities.name: Create Options Page
abilities.description: Programmatically register global ACF Options Page.

abilities.name: Get Option Value
abilities.description: Read global option value metadata.

abilities.name: Update Option Value
abilities.description: Write option values globally.

abilities.name: Activate Widget
abilities.description: Enables a specific UAE widget.

abilities.name: Add Column to Section
abilities.description: Adds a new column to Elementor post.

abilities.name: Add Section/Container
abilities.description: Adds a structural layout element.

abilities.name: Build Complete Layout
abilities.description: Builds layout from JSON.

abilities.name: Bulk Toggle All Widgets
abilities.description: Activates/deactivates every widget.

abilities.name: Clear Elementor Cache
abilities.description: Clears CSS cache globally.

abilities.name: Create Page
abilities.description: Creates an Elementor page.

abilities.name: Create Template
abilities.description: Creates UAE template.

abilities.name: Deactivate Unused Widgets
abilities.description: Scans and disables unused widgets.

abilities.name: Deactivate Widget
abilities.description: Disables specific UAE widget.

abilities.name: Delete Page
abilities.description: Trashes an Elementor page.

abilities.name: Delete Template
abilities.description: Trashes a UAE template.

abilities.name: Duplicate Template
abilities.description: Duplicates a template.

abilities.name: Get All Active Templates
abilities.description: Returns active templates.

abilities.name: Get Available Locations
abilities.description: Lists display rule locations.

abilities.name: Get Design Tokens
abilities.description: Returns global colors/fonts.

abilities.name: Get Element Schema
abilities.description: Returns widget setting schema.

abilities.name: Get Plugin Info
abilities.description: Returns UAE info.

abilities.name: Get Plugin Settings
abilities.description: Gets plugin level settings.

abilities.name: Get Post Structure
abilities.description: Returns Elementor tree.

abilities.name: Get Template Details
abilities.description: Returns full details of template.

abilities.name: Get Theme Info
abilities.description: Returns theme compatibility.

abilities.name: Get Widget Usage Map
abilities.description: Returns site-wide usage counts.

abilities.name: Insert Widget
abilities.description: Inserts new widget.

abilities.name: List Available Widget Types
abilities.description: Lists Elementor widgets.

abilities.name: List Extensions
abilities.description: Lists UAE extensions.

abilities.name: List Pages
abilities.description: Lists Elementor pages.

abilities.name: List Templates
abilities.description: Lists UAE templates.

abilities.name: List Widgets
abilities.description: Lists UAE widgets.

abilities.name: Move Element
abilities.description: Repositions an element.

abilities.name: Regenerate CSS
abilities.description: Forces frontend CSS regen.

abilities.name: Remove Element
abilities.description: Removes a widget/container.

abilities.name: Render Template Shortcode
abilities.description: Renders shortcode.

abilities.name: Restore Page
abilities.description: Restores page from trash.

abilities.name: Restore Template from Trash
abilities.description: Restores template from trash.

abilities.name: Set Theme Compatibility Method
abilities.description: Configures fallback method.

abilities.name: Toggle Extension
abilities.description: Enables/disables extension.

abilities.name: UAE Pro Features Info
abilities.description: Gets Pro upgrade info.

abilities.name: Undo Last Builder Change
abilities.description: Reverts recent change.

abilities.name: Update Display Rules
abilities.description: Sets include/exclude locations.

abilities.name: Update Page Meta
abilities.description: Updates page meta.

abilities.name: Update Page Status
abilities.description: Publishes/unpublishes page.

abilities.name: Update Plugin Setting
abilities.description: Updates plugin setting.

abilities.name: Update Template
abilities.description: Updates template type/status.

abilities.name: Update Widget Settings
abilities.description: Updates widget keys.

abilities.name: List Forms
abilities.description: Lists all Gravity Forms (ID, title, date, active status, entry count).

abilities.name: Get Form
abilities.description: Retrieves full JSON structure of a form (fields, labels, types, choices, rules).

abilities.name: Create Form
abilities.description: Creates a new form structure with title and optional fields.

abilities.name: Update Form
abilities.description: Updates form properties, fields, or active status.

abilities.name: Delete Form
abilities.description: Deletes or trashes a form.

abilities.name: List Entries
abilities.description: Lists submissions/leads for a specific form (paginated).

abilities.name: Get Entry
abilities.description: Retrieves complete submission details by entry ID.

abilities.name: Update Entry
abilities.description: Updates field values or status (read/unread/starred) inside an entry.

abilities.name: Delete Entry
abilities.description: Trashes or permanently deletes an entry.

abilities.name: Get Notifications
abilities.description: Gets notification settings (emails, feeds) for a form.

abilities.name: Get Confirmations
abilities.description: Gets confirmation settings (thank-you messages, redirects) for a form.

abilities.name: Create Notification
abilities.description: Creates a new email notification (to, subject, message, from, etc.).

abilities.name: Update Notification
abilities.description: Updates an existing notification (to, subject, message, active status, etc.).

abilities.name: Delete Notification
abilities.description: Deletes a notification from a form.

abilities.name: Create Confirmation
abilities.description: Creates a confirmation (thank-you message, redirect, or page).

abilities.name: Update Confirmation
abilities.description: Updates an existing confirmation (message, redirect URL, default status, etc.).

abilities.name: Delete Confirmation
abilities.description: Deletes a confirmation from a form.

abilities.name: Update Form Settings
abilities.description: Updates form-level settings (label placement, restrictions, scheduling, honeypot, etc.).
